prompt:

`r```````````.F.o.r. .p.e.n.g.u.i.n.si

input.command:

s = 'r```````````.F.o.r. .p.e.n.g.u.i.n.si'
print('Backticks:', s.count('`'))
print('Length:', len(s))
PY

python3 - <<'PY'
s = 'r```````````.H.e.l.l.o. .w.o.r.l.di'
print('Backticks:', s.count('`'))
print('Length:', len(s))
PY
